Adversity Policy.name: Adversity Policy
Adversity Policy.effect: If the Pokémon this card is attached to has Weakness to your opponent's Active Pokémon's type, is in the Active Spot, and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), draw 3 cards.

Ange Floette.name: Ange Floette
Ange Floette.effect:
You can put this card into play only if you discard a Prism Tower in play, and you can put this card into play during the same turn you play Prism Tower.
Each Mega Floette ex in play (both yours and your opponent's) gets +150 HP.

AZ's Tranquility.name: AZ's Tranquility
AZ's Tranquility.effect: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you moved a Pokémon ex to your Bench in this way, heal 80 damage from that Pokémon.

Emma.name: Emma
Emma.effect: Your opponent reveals their hand, and you draw a card for each Pokémon you find there.

Great Haul Net.name: Great Haul Net
Great Haul Net.effect:
Choose 1 or both:
• Shuffle up to 3 {W} Pokémon from your discard pile into your deck.
• Shuffle up to 3 Basic {W} Energy cards from your discard pile into your deck.

Philippe.name: Philippe
Philippe.effect: Attach up to 2 Basic {M} Energy cards from your discard pile to 1 of your {M} Pokémon.

Prism Tower.name: Prism Tower
Prism Tower.effect: Once during each player's turn, that player may discard 2 cards from their hand in order to draw a card.

Roxie's Performance.name: Roxie's Performance
Roxie's Performance.effect: During your opponent's next turn, their Poisoned Pokémon can't retreat. (This includes newly Poisoned Pokémon.)

Special Red Card.name: Special Red Card
Special Red Card.effect:
You can use this card only if your opponent has 3 or fewer Prize cards remaining.

Your opponent shuffles their hand and puts it on the bottom of their deck. If they put any cards on the bottom of their deck in this way, they draw 3 cards.

Transformation Tome.name: Transformation Tome
Transformation Tome.effect:
You must play 2 Transformation Tome cards at once. (This effect works one time for 2 cards.)

Choose a Basic Pokémon in your discard pile and switch it with 1 of your Basic Pokémon in play. Any attached cards, damage counters, Special Conditions, turns in play, and any other effects remain on the new Pokémon.

Energy Retrieval.name: Energy Retrieval
Energy Retrieval.effect: Put up to 2 Basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.

Jumbo Ice Cream.name: Jumbo Ice Cream
Jumbo Ice Cream.effect: Heal 80 damage from your Active Pokémon that has 3 or more Energy attached.

Surfing Beach.name: Surfing Beach
Surfing Beach.effect: Once during each player's turn, that player may switch their Active {W} Pokémon with 1 of their Benched {W} Pokémon.

Tool Scrapper.name: Tool Scrapper
Tool Scrapper.effect: Choose up to 2 Pokémon Tools attached to Pokémon (yours or your opponent's) and discard them.

Black Belt's Training.name: Black Belt's Training
Black Belt's Training.effect: During this turn, attacks used by your Pokémon do 40 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon ex (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Professor's Research.name: Professor's Research
Professor's Research.effect: Discard your hand and draw 7 cards.

Antique Jaw Fossil.name: Antique Jaw Fossil
Antique Jaw Fossil.effect:
Play this card as if it were a 60-HP Basic {C} Pokémon. This card can't be affected by any Special Conditions and can't retreat.

At any time during your turn, you may discard this card from play.

Antique Sail Fossil.name: Antique Sail Fossil
Antique Sail Fossil.effect:
Play this card as if it were a 60-HP Basic {C} Pokémon. This card can't be affected by any Special Conditions and can't retreat.

At any time during your turn, you may discard this card from play.

Core Memory.name: Core Memory
Core Memory.effect: The Mega Zygarde ex this card is attached to can use the attack on this card. (You still need the necessary Energy to use this attack.)

Crushing Hammer.name: Crushing Hammer
Crushing Hammer.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

Energy Search.name: Energy Search
Energy Search.effect: Search your deck for a Basic Energy card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Energy Swatter.name: Energy Swatter
Energy Swatter.effect: Your opponent reveals their hand, and you choose an Energy card you find there and put it on the bottom of their deck.

Hole-Digging Shovel.name: Hole-Digging Shovel
Hole-Digging Shovel.effect: Discard the top 2 cards of your deck.

Jacinthe.name: Jacinthe
Jacinthe.effect: Heal 150 damage from 1 of your {P} Pokémon.

Judge.name: Judge
Judge.effect: Each player shuffles their hand into their deck and draws 4 cards.

Lumiose City.name: Lumiose City
Lumiose City.effect: Once during each player's turn, that player may search their deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto their Bench. Then, that player shuffles their deck. If a player searches their deck in this way, their turn ends.

Lumiose Galette.name: Lumiose Galette
Lumiose Galette.effect: Heal 20 damage and remove a Special Condition from your Active Pokémon.

Naveen.name: Naveen
Naveen.effect: Draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand. Before drawing cards, you may discard any number of cards from your hand. (If you can't draw any cards in this way, you can't use this card.)

Pok\u00e9 Ball.name: Poké Ball
Pok\u00e9 Ball.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Pok\u00e9 Pad.name: Poké Pad
Pok\u00e9 Pad.effect: Search your deck for a Pokémon that doesn't have a Rule Box, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. (Pokémon ex, Pokémon V, etc. have Rule Boxes.)

Pok\u00e9mon Catcher.name: Pokémon Catcher
Pok\u00e9mon Catcher.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.

Potion.name: Potion
Potion.effect: Heal 30 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

Rosa's Encouragement.name: Rosa's Encouragement
Rosa's Encouragement.effect:
You can use this card only if you have more Prize cards remaining than your opponent.

Attach up to 2 Basic Energy cards from your discard pile to 1 of your Stage 2 Pokémon.

Tarragon.name: Tarragon
Tarragon.effect: Put up to 4 in any combination of {F} Pokémon and Basic {F} Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.

Energy Recycler.name: Energy Recycler
Energy Recycler.effect: Shuffle up to 5 Basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your deck.

Forest of Vitality.name: Forest of Vitality
Forest of Vitality.effect: Each player's {G} Pokémon can evolve into {G} Pokémon during the turn they play those Pokémon, except during their first turn.

Sacred Ash.name: Sacred Ash
Sacred Ash.effect: Shuffle up to 5 Pokémon from your discard pile into your deck.

Wondrous Patch.name: Wondrous Patch
Wondrous Patch.effect: Attach a Basic {P} Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched {P} Pokémon.

Accompanying Flute.name: Accompanying Flute
Accompanying Flute.effect: Reveal the top 5 cards of your opponent's deck. You may choose any number of Basic Pokémon you find there and put those Pokémon onto their Bench. Your opponent shuffles the other cards back into their deck.

Bug Catching Set.name: Bug Catching Set
Bug Catching Set.effect: Look at the top 7 cards of your deck. You may reveal up to 2 in any combination of {G} Pokémon and Basic {G} Energy cards you find there and put them into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

Caretaker.name: Caretaker
Caretaker.effect: Draw 2 cards. If you drew any cards in this way and if Community Center is in play, shuffle this Caretaker into your deck instead of discarding it.

Carmine.name: Carmine
Carmine.effect:
If you go first, you may use this card during your first turn.

Discard your hand and draw 5 cards.

Community Center.name: Community Center
Community Center.effect: Once during each player's turn, if they played a Supporter card from their hand this turn, they may heal 10 damage from each of their Pokémon.

Cook.name: Cook
Cook.effect: Heal 70 damage from your Active Pokémon.

Enhanced Hammer.name: Enhanced Hammer
Enhanced Hammer.effect: Discard a Special Energy from 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

Festival Grounds.name: Festival Grounds
Festival Grounds.effect: Each Pokémon that has any Energy attached (both yours and your opponent's) recovers from all Special Conditions and can't be affected by any Special Conditions.

Handheld Fan.name: Handheld Fan
Handheld Fan.effect: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), move an Energy from the Attacking Pokémon to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

Hassel.name: Hassel
Hassel.effect:
You can use this card only if any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn.

Look at the top 8 cards of your deck and put up to 3 of them into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

Jamming Tower.name: Jamming Tower
Jamming Tower.effect: Pokémon Tools attached to each Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) have no effect.

Kieran.name: Kieran
Kieran.effect:
Choose 1:

• Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

• During this turn, attacks used by your Pokémon do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon ex and Active Pokémon V (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Lana's Aid.name: Lana's Aid
Lana's Aid.effect: Put up to 3 in any combination of Pokémon that don't have a Rule Box and Basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand. (Pokémon ex, Pokémon V, etc. have Rule Boxes.)

Love Ball.name: Love Ball
Love Ball.effect: Search your deck for a Pokémon with the same name as 1 of your opponent's Pokémon in play, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Lucian.name: Lucian
Lucian.effect: Each player shuffles their hand and puts it on the bottom of their deck. If either player put any cards on the bottom of their deck in this way, each player flips a coin. If heads, that player draws 6 cards. If tails, they draw 3 cards.

Lucky Helmet.name: Lucky Helmet
Lucky Helmet.effect: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), draw 2 cards.

Ogre's Mask.name: Ogre's Mask
Ogre's Mask.effect: Choose a Pokémon ex in your discard pile that has "Ogerpon" in its name, and switch it with 1 of your Pokémon ex in play that has "Ogerpon" in its name. Any attached cards, damage counters, Special Conditions, turns in play, and any other effects remain on the new Pokémon.

Perrin.name: Perrin
Perrin.effect: Reveal up to 2 Pokémon in your hand and put them into your deck. If you do, search your deck for up to that many Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Raifort.name: Raifort
Raifort.effect: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck and discard any number of them. Put the other cards back in any order.

Buddy-Buddy Poffin.name: Buddy-Buddy Poffin
Buddy-Buddy Poffin.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon with 70 HP or less and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

Rescue Board.name: Rescue Board
Rescue Board.effect: The Retreat Cost of the Pokémon this card is attached to is {C} less. If that Pokémon's remaining HP is 30 or less, it has no Retreat Cost.

Arven's Sandwich.name: Arven's Sandwich
Arven's Sandwich.effect: Heal 30 damage from your Active Pokémon. If that Pokémon is an Arven's Pokémon, heal 100 damage from it instead.

Cynthia's Power Weight.name: Cynthia's Power Weight
Cynthia's Power Weight.effect: The Cynthia's Pokémon this card is attached to gets +70 HP.

Emcee's Hype.name: Emcee's Hype
Emcee's Hype.effect: Draw 2 cards. If your opponent has 3 or fewer Prize cards remaining, draw 2 more cards.

Ethan's Adventure.name: Ethan's Adventure
Ethan's Adventure.effect: Search your deck for up to 3 in any combination of Ethan's Pokémon and Basic {R} Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Granite Cave.name: Granite Cave
Granite Cave.effect: Steven's Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) take 30 less damage from attacks from the opponent's Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

Spikemuth Gym.name: Spikemuth Gym
Spikemuth Gym.effect: Once during each player's turn, that player may search their deck for a Marnie's Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into their hand. Then, that player shuffles their deck.

Team Rocket's Archer.name: Team Rocket's Archer
Team Rocket's Archer.effect:
You can use this card only if any of your Team Rocket's Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn.

Each player shuffles their hand into their deck. Then, you draw 5 cards, and your opponent draws 3 cards.

Team Rocket's Ariana.name: Team Rocket's Ariana
Team Rocket's Ariana.effect: Draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand. If all of your Pokémon in play are Team Rocket's Pokémon, draw cards until you have 8 cards in your hand instead.

Team Rocket's Bother-Bot.name: Team Rocket's Bother-Bot
Team Rocket's Bother-Bot.effect: Turn 1 of your opponent's face-down Prize cards face up and choose a random card from your opponent's hand. Your opponent reveals that card. You may have your opponent switch those cards. (That Prize card remains face up for the rest of the game.)

Team Rocket's Factory.name: Team Rocket's Factory
Team Rocket's Factory.effect: Once during each player's turn, if they played a Supporter card that has "Team Rocket" in its name from their hand this turn, they may draw 2 cards.

Team Rocket's Giovanni.name: Team Rocket's Giovanni
Team Rocket's Giovanni.effect: Switch your Active Team Rocket's Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Team Rocket's Pokémon. If you do, switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.

Team Rocket's Great Ball.name: Team Rocket's Great Ball
Team Rocket's Great Ball.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for an Evolution Team Rocket's Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If tails, search your deck for a Basic Team Rocket's Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Team Rocket's Petrel.name: Team Rocket's Petrel
Team Rocket's Petrel.effect: Search your deck for a Trainer card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Team Rocket's Proton.name: Team Rocket's Proton
Team Rocket's Proton.effect:
If you go first, you may use this card during your first turn.

Search your deck for up to 3 Basic Team Rocket's Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Team Rocket's Transceiver.name: Team Rocket's Transceiver
Team Rocket's Transceiver.effect: Search your deck for a Supporter card that has "Team Rocket" in its name, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Team Rocket's Venture Bomb.name: Team Rocket's Venture Bomb
Team Rocket's Venture Bomb.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, put 2 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. If tails, put 2 damage counters on your Active Pokémon.

Team Rocket's Watchtower.name: Team Rocket's Watchtower
Team Rocket's Watchtower.effect: {C} Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) have no Abilities.

TM Machine.name: TM Machine
TM Machine.effect: Search your deck for up to 3 Pokémon Tool cards that have "Technical Machine" in their name, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Levincia.name: Levincia
Levincia.effect: Once during each player's turn, that player may put up to 2 Basic {L} Energy cards from their discard pile into their hand.

Antique Cover Fossil.name: Antique Cover Fossil
Antique Cover Fossil.effect:
Play this card as if it were a 60-HP Basic {C} Pokémon. This card can't be affected by any Special Conditions and can't retreat.

At any time during your turn, you may discard this card from play.

Antique Root Fossil.name: Antique Root Fossil
Antique Root Fossil.effect:
Play this card as if it were a 60-HP Basic {C} Pokémon. This card can't be affected by any Special Conditions and can't retreat.

At any time during your turn, you may discard this card from play.

Area Zero Underdepths.name: Area Zero Underdepths
Area Zero Underdepths.effect:
Each player who has any Tera Pokémon in play can have up to 8 Pokémon on their Bench.

If a player no longer has any Tera Pokémon in play, that player discards Pokémon from their Bench until they have 5. When this card leaves play, both players discard Pokémon from their Bench until they have 5, and the player who played this card discards first.

Briar.name: Briar
Briar.effect:
You can use this card only if your opponent has exactly 2 Prize cards remaining.

During this turn, if your opponent's Active Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack used by your Tera Pokémon, take 1 more Prize card.

Crispin.name: Crispin
Crispin.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Energy cards of different types, reveal them, and put 1 of them into your hand. Attach the other to 1 of your Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

Glass Trumpet.name: Glass Trumpet
Glass Trumpet.effect:
You can use this card only if you have any Tera Pokémon in play.

Choose up to 2 of your Benched {C} Pokémon and attach a Basic Energy card from your discard pile to each of them.

Gravity Gemstone.name: Gravity Gemstone
Gravity Gemstone.effect: As long as the Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot, the Retreat Cost of both Active Pokémon is {C} more.

Kofu.name: Kofu
Kofu.effect: Put 2 cards from your hand on the bottom of your deck in any order. If you put 2 cards on the bottom of your deck in this way, draw 4 cards. (If you can't put 2 cards from your hand on the bottom of your deck, you can't use this card.)

Lacey.name: Lacey
Lacey.effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 4 cards. If your opponent has 3 or fewer Prize cards remaining, draw 8 cards instead.

Occa Berry.name: Occa Berry
Occa Berry.effect: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is damaged by an attack from your opponent's {R} Pokémon, it takes 60 less damage (after applying Weakness and Resistance), and discard this card.

Payapa Berry.name: Payapa Berry
Payapa Berry.effect: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is damaged by an attack from your opponent's {P} Pokémon, it takes 60 less damage (after applying Weakness and Resistance), and discard this card.

Battle Cage.name: Battle Cage
Battle Cage.effect: Prevent all damage counters from being placed on Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) by effects of attacks and Abilities from the opponent's Pokémon. (Damage from attacks is still taken.)

Blowtorch.name: Blowtorch
Blowtorch.effect:
You can use this card only if you discard a Basic {R} Energy card from your hand.

Discard a Pokémon Tool or Special Energy card from 1 of your opponent's Pokémon, or discard a Stadium in play.

Dawn.name: Dawn
Dawn.effect: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon, a Stage 1 Pokémon, and a Stage 2 Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Dizzying Valley.name: Dizzying Valley
Dizzying Valley.effect: Confused Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) don't recover from that Special Condition when they evolve or devolve.

Firebreather.name: Firebreather
Firebreather.effect: Search your deck for up to 7 Basic {R} Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Grimsley's Move.name: Grimsley's Move
Grimsley's Move.effect: Look at the top 7 cards of your deck and put a {D} Pokémon you find there onto your Bench. Shuffle the other cards and put them on the bottom of your deck. You can't use this card during your first turn.

Punk Helmet.name: Punk Helmet
Punk Helmet.effect: If the {D} Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), place 4 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon.

Sacred Charm.name: Sacred Charm
Sacred Charm.effect: The Pokémon this card is attached to takes 30 less damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokémon that have an Ability (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

Switch.name: Switch
Switch.effect: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

Acerola's Mischief.name: Acerola's Mischief
Acerola's Mischief.effect:
You can use this card only if your opponent has 2 or fewer Prize cards remaining.

Choose 1 of your Pokémon in play. During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to that Pokémon by your opponent's Pokémon ex.

Boss's Orders.name: Boss's Orders
Boss's Orders.effect: Switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.

Energy Switch.name: Energy Switch
Energy Switch.effect: Move a Basic Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

Fighting Gong.name: Fighting Gong
Fighting Gong.effect: Search your deck for a Basic {F} Energy card or a Basic {F} Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Iron Defender.name: Iron Defender
Iron Defender.effect: During your opponent's next turn, all of your {M} Pokémon take 30 less damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance). (This includes new Pokémon that come into play.)

Lillie's Determination.name: Lillie's Determination
Lillie's Determination.effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 6 cards. If you have exactly 6 Prize cards remaining, draw 8 cards instead.

Lt. Surge's Bargain.name: Lt. Surge's Bargain
Lt. Surge's Bargain.effect: Ask your opponent if each player may take a Prize card. If yes, each player takes a Prize card. If no, you draw 4 cards.

Mega Signal.name: Mega Signal
Mega Signal.effect: Search your deck for a Mega Evolution Pokémon ex, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Mystery Garden.name: Mystery Garden
Mystery Garden.effect: Once during each player's turn, that player may discard an Energy card from their hand in order to draw cards until they have as many cards in their hand as they have {P} Pokémon in play.

Pok\u00e9mon Center Lady.name: Pokémon Center Lady
Pok\u00e9mon Center Lady.effect: Heal 60 damage from 1 of your Pokémon, and it recovers from all Special Conditions.

Premium Power Pro.name: Premium Power Pro
Premium Power Pro.effect: During this turn, attacks used by your {F} Pokémon do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Rare Candy.name: Rare Candy
Rare Candy.effect: Choose 1 of your Basic Pokémon in play. If you have a Stage 2 card in your hand that evolves from that Pokémon, put that card onto the Basic Pokémon to evolve it, skipping the Stage 1. You can't use this card during your first turn or on a Basic Pokémon that was put into play this turn.

Repel.name: Repel
Repel.effect: Switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

Risky Ruins.name: Risky Ruins
Risky Ruins.effect: Whenever any player puts a Basic non-{D} Pokémon onto their Bench during their turn, place 2 damage counters on that Pokémon.

Strange Timepiece.name: Strange Timepiece
Strange Timepiece.effect: Devolve 1 of your evolved {P} Pokémon by putting any number of Evolution cards on it into your hand. (That Pokémon can't evolve this turn.)

Ultra Ball.name: Ultra Ball
Ultra Ball.effect:
You can use this card only if you discard 2 other cards from your hand.

Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Wally's Compassion.name: Wally's Compassion
Wally's Compassion.effect: Heal all damage from 1 of your Mega Evolution Pokémon ex. If you healed any damage in this way, put all Energy attached to that Pokémon into your hand.

Air Balloon.name: Air Balloon
Air Balloon.effect: The Retreat Cost of the Pokémon this card is attached to is {C}{C} less.

Night Stretcher.name: Night Stretcher
Night Stretcher.effect: Put a Pokémon or a Basic Energy card from your discard pile into your hand.

Babiri Berry.name: Babiri Berry
Babiri Berry.effect: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is damaged by an attack from your opponent's {M} Pokémon, it takes 60 less damage (after applying Weakness and Resistance), and discard this card.

Call Bell.name: Call Bell
Call Bell.effect:
You can use this card only if you go second, and only during your first turn.

Search your deck for a Supporter card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Chill Teaser Toy.name: Chill Teaser Toy
Chill Teaser Toy.effect:
You can use this card only if you go second, and only during your first turn.

Put an Energy attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon into their hand.

Clemont's Quick Wit.name: Clemont's Quick Wit
Clemont's Quick Wit.effect: Heal 60 damage from each of your {L} Pokémon.

Colbur Berry.name: Colbur Berry
Colbur Berry.effect: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is damaged by an attack from your opponent's {D} Pokémon, it takes 60 less damage (after applying Weakness and Resistance), and discard this card.

Counter Gain.name: Counter Gain
Counter Gain.effect: If you have more Prize cards remaining than your opponent, attacks used by the Pokémon this card is attached to cost {C} less.

Cyrano.name: Cyrano
Cyrano.effect: Search your deck for up to 3 Pokémon ex, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Deduction Kit.name: Deduction Kit
Deduction Kit.effect: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck and put them back in any order, or shuffle them and put them on the bottom of your deck.

Dragon Elixir.name: Dragon Elixir
Dragon Elixir.effect: Heal 60 damage from your Active {N} Pokémon.

Drasna.name: Drasna
Drasna.effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, flip a coin. If heads, draw 8 cards. If tails, draw 3 cards.

Drayton.name: Drayton
Drayton.effect: Look at the top 7 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Pokémon and a Trainer card you find there and put them into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

Dusk Ball.name: Dusk Ball
Dusk Ball.effect: Look at the bottom 7 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Pokémon you find there and put it into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

Gravity Mountain.name: Gravity Mountain
Gravity Mountain.effect: Each Stage 2 Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) gets -30 HP.

Jasmine's Gaze.name: Jasmine's Gaze
Jasmine's Gaze.effect: During your opponent's next turn, all of your Pokémon take 30 less damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance). (This includes new Pokémon that come into play.)

Lisia's Appeal.name: Lisia's Appeal
Lisia's Appeal.effect: Switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Basic Pokémon to the Active Spot. If you do, the new Active Pokémon is now Confused.

Lively Stadium.name: Lively Stadium
Lively Stadium.effect: Each Basic Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) gets +30 HP.

Meddling Memo.name: Meddling Memo
Meddling Memo.effect: Your opponent counts the cards in their hand, shuffles those cards, and puts them on the bottom of their deck. If they do, they draw that many cards.

Passho Berry.name: Passho Berry
Passho Berry.effect: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is damaged by an attack from your opponent's {W} Pokémon, it takes 60 less damage (after applying Weakness and Resistance), and discard this card.

Surfer.name: Surfer
Surfer.effect: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand.

Technical Machine: Fluorite.name: Technical Machine: Fluorite
Technical Machine: Fluorite.effect: The Pokémon this card is attached to can use the attack on this card. (You still need the necessary Energy to use this attack.) If this card is attached to 1 of your Pokémon, discard it at the end of your turn.

Tera Orb.name: Tera Orb
Tera Orb.effect: Search your deck for a Tera Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Tyme.name: Tyme
Tyme.effect: Tell your opponent the name of a Pokémon in your hand and put that Pokémon face down in front of you. Your opponent guesses that Pokémon's HP, and then you reveal it. If your opponent guessed right, they draw 4 cards. If they guessed wrong, you draw 4 cards. Then, return the Pokémon to your hand.

Amarys.name: Amarys
Amarys.effect: Draw 4 cards. At the end of this turn, if you have 5 or more cards in your hand, discard your hand.

Binding Mochi.name: Binding Mochi
Binding Mochi.effect: Attacks used by the Poisoned Pokémon this card is attached to do 40 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Ciphermaniac's Codebreaking.name: Ciphermaniac's Codebreaking
Ciphermaniac's Codebreaking.effect: Search your deck for 2 cards, shuffle your deck, then put those cards on top of it in any order.

Earthen Vessel.name: Earthen Vessel
Earthen Vessel.effect:
You can use this card only if you discard another card from your hand.

Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Explorer's Guidance.name: Explorer's Guidance
Explorer's Guidance.effect: Look at the top 6 cards of your deck and put 2 of them into your hand. Discard the other cards.

Haban Berry.name: Haban Berry
Haban Berry.effect: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is damaged by an attack from your opponent's {N} Pokémon, it takes 60 less damage (after applying Weakness and Resistance), and discard this card.

Janine's Secret Art.name: Janine's Secret Art
Janine's Secret Art.effect: Choose up to 2 of your {D} Pokémon. For each of those Pokémon, search your deck for a Basic {D} Energy card and attach it to that Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck. If you attached Energy to your Active Pokémon in this way, it is now Poisoned.

Larry's Skill.name: Larry's Skill
Larry's Skill.effect: Discard your hand and search your deck for a Pokémon, a Supporter card, and a Basic Energy card, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Professor Sada's Vitality.name: Professor Sada's Vitality
Professor Sada's Vitality.effect: Choose up to 2 of your Ancient Pokémon and attach a Basic Energy card from your discard pile to each of them. If you attached any Energy in this way, draw 3 cards.

Professor Turo's Scenario.name: Professor Turo's Scenario
Professor Turo's Scenario.effect: Put 1 of your Pokémon in play into your hand. (Discard all cards attached to that Pokémon.)

Roto-Stick.name: Roto-Stick
Roto-Stick.effect: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal any number of Supporter cards you find there and put them into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

Techno Radar.name: Techno Radar
Techno Radar.effect:
You can use this card only if you discard another card from your hand.

Search your deck for up to 2 Future Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Eri.name: Eri
Eri.effect: Your opponent reveals their hand, and you discard up to 2 Item cards you find there.

Ancient Booster Energy Capsule.name: Ancient Booster Energy Capsule
Ancient Booster Energy Capsule.effect: The Ancient Pokémon this card is attached to gets +60 HP, recovers from all Special Conditions, and can't be affected by any Special Conditions.

Bianca's Devotion.name: Bianca's Devotion
Bianca's Devotion.effect: Heal all damage from 1 of your Pokémon that has 30 HP or less remaining.

Boxed Order.name: Boxed Order
Boxed Order.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Item cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. Your turn ends.

Full Metal Lab.name: Full Metal Lab
Full Metal Lab.effect: {M} Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) take 30 less damage from attacks from the opponent's Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

Future Booster Energy Capsule.name: Future Booster Energy Capsule
Future Booster Energy Capsule.effect: The Future Pokémon this card is attached to has no Retreat Cost, and the attacks it uses do 20 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Hand Trimmer.name: Hand Trimmer
Hand Trimmer.effect: Each player discards cards from their hand until they have 5 cards in their hand. Your opponent discards first. (If a player has 5 or fewer cards in their hand, they do not discard.)

Heavy Baton.name: Heavy Baton
Heavy Baton.effect: If the Pokémon this card is attached to has a Retreat Cost of exactly 4, is in the Active Spot, and is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, move up to 3 Basic Energy cards from that Pokémon to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like.

Morty's Conviction.name: Morty's Conviction
Morty's Conviction.effect:
You can use this card only if you discard another card from your hand.

Draw a card for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

Perilous Jungle.name: Perilous Jungle
Perilous Jungle.effect: During Pokémon Checkup, put 2 more damage counters on each Poisoned non-{D} Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

Salvatore.name: Salvatore
Salvatore.effect: Search your deck for a card that has no Abilities and evolves from 1 of your Pokémon, and put it onto that Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck. You can use this card on a Pokémon you put down when you were setting up to play or on a Pokémon that was put into play this turn.

Academy at Night.name: Academy at Night
Academy at Night.effect: Once during each player's turn, that player may put a card from their hand on top of their deck.

Cassiopeia.name: Cassiopeia
Cassiopeia.effect:
You can use this card only when it is the last card in your hand.

Search your deck for up to 2 cards and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Colress's Tenacity.name: Colress's Tenacity
Colress's Tenacity.effect: Search your deck for a Stadium card and an Energy card, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Powerglass.name: Powerglass
Powerglass.effect: At the end of your turn (after your attack), if the Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot, you may attach a Basic Energy card from your discard pile to it.

Xerosic's Machinations.name: Xerosic's Machinations
Xerosic's Machinations.effect: Your opponent discards cards from their hand until they have 3 cards in their hand.

Billy & O'Nare.name: Billy & O'Nare
Billy & O'Nare.effect: Draw 2 cards. Then, if you have 10 or more cards in your hand, draw 2 more cards.

Brock's Scouting.name: Brock's Scouting
Brock's Scouting.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon or 1 Evolution Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Hop's Bag.name: Hop's Bag
Hop's Bag.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Hop's Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

Hop's Choice Band.name: Hop's Choice Band
Hop's Choice Band.effect: Attacks used by the Hop's Pokémon this card is attached to cost {C} less and do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Iris's Fighting Spirit.name: Iris's Fighting Spirit
Iris's Fighting Spirit.effect:
You can use this card only if you discard another card from your hand.

Draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.

Lillie's Pearl.name: Lillie's Pearl
Lillie's Pearl.effect: If the Lillie's Pokémon this card is attached to is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, that player takes 1 fewer Prize card.

N's Castle.name: N's Castle
N's Castle.effect: N's Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) have no Retreat Cost.

N's PP Up.name: N's PP Up
N's PP Up.effect: Attach a Basic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched N's Pokémon.

Postwick.name: Postwick
Postwick.effect: Attacks used by Hop's Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) do 30 more damage to the opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Redeemable Ticket.name: Redeemable Ticket
Redeemable Ticket.effect: Count your Prize cards, shuffle them, and put them on the bottom of your deck. Then, take that many cards from the top of your deck and put them face down as your Prize cards.

Ruffian.name: Ruffian
Ruffian.effect: Discard a Pokémon Tool and a Special Energy from 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

Super Potion.name: Super Potion
Super Potion.effect: Heal 60 damage from 1 of your Pokémon. If you healed any damage in this way, discard an Energy from that Pokémon.

Anthea & Concordia.name: Anthea & Concordia
Anthea & Concordia.effect:
You can use this card only if you have N's Darmanitan, N's Zoroark ex, N's Vanilluxe, N's Klinklang, N's Reshiram, and N's Zekrom in play.

During this turn, if your opponent's Active Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack used by your N's Pokémon, take 3 more Prize cards.

Canari.name: Canari
Canari.effect:
You can use this card only if you discard another card from your hand.

Search your deck for up to 4 {L} Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Light Ball.name: Light Ball
Light Ball.effect: Attacks used by the Pikachu ex this card is attached to do 50 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon ex (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Nighttime Mine.name: Nighttime Mine
Nighttime Mine.effect: Attacks used by each Tera Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) cost {C} more.

Team Rocket's Hypnotizer.name: Team Rocket's Hypnotizer
Team Rocket's Hypnotizer.effect: If the Team Rocket's Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Team Rocket's Pokémon is Knocked Out), the Attacking Pokémon is now Asleep.

Thick Scale.name: Thick Scale
Thick Scale.effect: The {N} Pokémon this card is attached to takes 50 less damage from attacks from your opponent's {G}, {R}, {W}, or {L} Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

Waitress.name: Waitress
Waitress.effect: Look at the top 6 cards of your deck and attach a Basic Energy card you find there to 1 of your Pokémon. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

Energy Coin.name: Energy Coin
Energy Coin.effect: Flip 2 coins. If both of them are heads, search your deck for a Basic Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

Fennel.name: Fennel
Fennel.effect: Heal 40 damage from each of your Pokémon.

N's Plan.name: N's Plan
N's Plan.effect: Move up to 2 Energy from your Benched Pokémon to your Active Pokémon.

Pok\u00e9gear 3.0.name: Pokégear 3.0
Pok\u00e9gear 3.0.effect: Look at the top 7 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Supporter card you find there and put it into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

Antique Plume Fossil.name: Antique Plume Fossil
Antique Plume Fossil.effect:
Play this card as if it were a 60-HP Basic {C} Pokémon. This card can't be affected by any Special Conditions and can't retreat.

At any time during your turn, you may discard this card from play.

Brave Bangle.name: Brave Bangle
Brave Bangle.effect: If the Pokémon this card is attached to doesn't have a Rule Box, the attacks it uses do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon ex (before applying Weakness and Resistance). (Pokémon ex, Pokémon V, etc. have Rule Boxes.)

Harlequin.name: Harlequin
Harlequin.effect: Each player shuffles their hand into their deck. Then, flip a coin. If heads, you draw 5 cards, and your opponent draws 3 cards. If tails, you draw 3 cards, and your opponent draws 5 cards.

Hilda.name: Hilda
Hilda.effect: Search your deck for an Evolution Pokémon and an Energy card, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
